title: The Reinforcement
narrative: After verifying the danger, Harry prepares to leave. Hermione, Ron, Neville, Luna, and Ginny stand with him. The Order may not arrive in time — unless you leave a clear trail. Six untrained students against an unknown number of Death Eaters in the heart of the Department of Mysteries: the math is brutal without backup.

options.text: Take only the DA. Speed matters more than backup — fly now, fly fast.
options.feedback_hint: Six teenagers against trained Death Eaters. The canonical mistake.

options.text: Before flying out, leave a clear signal for the Order — Snape, a Patronus, or the DA coin.
options.feedback_hint: Even minutes of warning let the Order intercept. Sirius arrives with backup, not alone.

free_text.prompt: How will you make sure reinforcements arrive in time?

categories.label: Alert the Order via a specific channel (Snape, Patronus, McGonagall, DA coin, written message)
Commit to going with only the DA; dismiss or skip alerting the Order
Vague hope that someone will follow or notice; no specific channel

free_text.llm_classification_criteria: Classify into exactly one category. ORDER_SIGNAL requires a named, specific channel by which the Order will learn what is happening. DA_ONLY is when the player explicitly chooses not to involve adults / the Order. WAIT_AND_HOPE is when the player gestures at backup but specifies no mechanism. INVALID for off-topic / refusal / nonsense.
